notes: Ease did not equal sustained completion; log component dropout and notification burden

notes: Adult indirect evidence for clear definitions routine fit feedback and data control

notes: Test acceptability implementation practicality and integration; exclude limited efficacy

notes: Pilot rehearses intended process; progression is not product efficacy safety or identity

notes: Borrow parallel logging but reject concealment; label participant-visible parallel comparison
